name: Beautify web landing auth page
description: Redesign the default web app landing/auth page to improve readability and visual hierarchy on first load. Keep the shared auth flow and translations intact, but make the page easier to scan, less visually overwhelming, and more polished across desktop and mobile. Validate the result with the repo-required pnpm ai pipeline after changes.
result: Redesigned the web app's default auth landing page to improve readability and reduce visual noise. Updated the shared auth shell with a calmer editorial layout, refined the supporting panel and language switcher, tightened provider buttons, and refreshed form card/input styling. Verified by loading http://localhost:5173/ in browser automation, confirming the auth screen content renders cleanly without oversized provider graphics, and running pnpm ai successfully.

name: Add auth Storybook stories
description: Create Storybook stories for the auth package's exported UI components and ensure the central storybook-base package discovers and renders them. Cover AuthLayout, AuthProviderButton, SignInForm, and SignUpForm with representative states and keep the stories compatible with the repo's existing Vite aliases and styling. Validate with Storybook build or equivalent plus pnpm ai.
result: Added Storybook support for the auth package by registering packages/auth/src in storybook-base discovery and creating stories for AuthLayout, AuthProviderButton, AuthFormCard/AuthTextField, SignInForm, and SignUpForm. Verified Storybook discovery with pnpm --filter storybook-base build-storybook and validated the full repo with pnpm ai successfully.
